mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_STTC WHERE REGST_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.select: /* CourtRcvSttcMapper.insertCrSttc */ INSERT INTO MSP_COURT_RCV_STTC ( REGST_DT, TOTAL, TOTAL_RG, SUM_RG, LC_RG, NC_RG, CC_RG, RP_RG, DP_RG, ETC_RG, SUM_RG_END, IMM_RG_END, DC_RG_END, TOTAL_BR, SUM_BR, BR_BR, ETC_BR, SUM_BR_END, IMM_BR_END, DC_BR_END, TOTAL_ENT, SUM_ENT, SUM_ENT_END, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) WITH CR_STTC AS ( SELECT STTC.CR_SEQ, STTC.TP_JINH, RSV.CR_TP, RSV.END_YN FROM (SELECT MAX(TP_JINH) AS TP_JINH, CR_SEQ FROM ( SELECT RCIV.CR_SEQ, RCIV.STAN_DTTM, RCIV.TP_JINH FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV RCIV, ( SELECT MAX(STAN_DTTM) AS STAN_DT, CR_SEQ FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV GROUP BY CR_SEQ) STAN WHERE RCIV.STAN_DTTM = STAN.STAN_DT AND RCIV.CR_SEQ = STAN.CR_SEQ) JINH GROUP BY CR_SEQ) STTC, MSP_COURT_RCV RSV WHERE STTC.CR_SEQ = RSV.CR_SEQ(+) ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DT, LC_RG.CNT + NC_RG.CNT + CC_RG.CNT + RP_RG.CNT + DP_RG.CNT + ETC_RG.CNT + IMM_RG_END.CNT + DC_RG_END.CNT + BR_BR.CNT + ETC_BR.CNT + IMM_BR_END.CNT + DC_BR_END.CNT + SUM_ENT.CNT + SUM_ENT_END.CNT AS TOTAL, LC_RG.CNT + NC_RG.CNT + CC_RG.CNT + RP_RG.CNT + DP_RG.CNT + ETC_RG.CNT + IMM_RG_END.CNT + DC_RG_END.CNT AS TOTAL_RG, LC_RG.CNT + NC_RG.CNT + CC_RG.CNT + RP_RG.CNT + DP_RG.CNT + ETC_RG.CNT AS SUM_RG, LC_RG.CNT AS LC_RG, NC_RG.CNT AS NC_RG, CC_RG.CNT AS CC_RG, RP_RG.CNT AS RP_RG, DP_RG.CNT AS DP_RG, ETC_RG.CNT AS ETC_RG, IMM_RG_END.CNT + DC_RG_END.CNT AS SUM_RG_END, IMM_RG_END.CNT AS IMM_RG_END, DC_RG_END.CNT AS DC_RG_END, BR_BR.CNT + ETC_BR.CNT + IMM_BR_END.CNT + DC_BR_END.CNT AS TOTAL_BR, BR_BR.CNT + ETC_BR.CNT AS SUM_BR, BR_BR.CNT AS BR_BR, ETC_BR.CNT AS ETC_BR, IMM_BR_END.CNT + DC_BR_END.CNT AS SUM_BR_END, IMM_BR_END.CNT AS IMM_BR_END, DC_BR_END.CNT AS DC_BR_END, SUM_ENT.CNT + SUM_ENT_END.CNT AS TOTAL_ENT, SUM_ENT.CNT AS SUM_ENT, SUM_ENT_END.CNT AS SUM_ENT_END, 'BATCH', SYSDATE, 'BATCH', SYSDATE FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '01') LC_RG, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '02') NC_RG, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '03') CC_RG, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '04') RP_RG, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '05') DP_RG, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '06') ETC_RG, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '07') IMM_RG_END, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '1' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '08') DC_RG_END, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '2' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '01') BR_BR, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '2' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '02') ETC_BR, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '2' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '03') IMM_BR_END, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '2' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '04') DC_BR_END, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '3' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '01') SUM_ENT, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CR_STTC WHERE CR_STTC.CR_TP = '3' AND CR_STTC.TP_JINH = '02') SUM_ENT_END
